siblings.title: Immersive experiences and hands-on workshops
siblings.summary: Workshops, brewery tours and immersive shows worth booking for a couple in Ghent in 2026 — picks, prices, durations and dated events.

siblings.title: Seasonal festivals and cultural events
siblings.summary: Month-by-month picks for a Ghent-based couple — UNESCO carnivals, flower festivals, summer street fests, and winter markets within easy train reach.

siblings.title: Spectator sports for date nights
siblings.summary: The Six Days of Ghent is the local date-night classic; KAA Gent fills the autumn-spring slot; the spring cobbled classics give you a free outdoor day.

siblings.title: Spa, wellness, and themed-stay weekends in Belgium
siblings.summary: A Ghent-anchored shortlist of thermal day-trips, full spa-hotel weekends, and themed nature stays — picked by drive time, vibe, and price.

siblings.title: Train-reachable city breaks from Ghent (BE/NL/FR/DE/LUX)
siblings.summary: 20+ cities ranked by train time, vibe, and best 2026 event windows — only Lille is direct from Ghent internationally; everything else routes via Brussels-Midi.

siblings.title: Outdoor adventures for couples
siblings.summary: Day trips, weekend escapes, and big-ticket adventures for a Ghent-based couple, ordered by season for 2026.
